title: Calculation Date function using interval and year
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE dim_tempo_1 ( id_tempo INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, data TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );
SELECT data FROM dim_tempo_1 WHERE data BETWEEN '2013-01-01 00:00:00' - INTERVAL 1 YEAR AND '2013-01-02 00:00:00' - INTERVAL 1 YEAR;
CREATE TABLE dim_tempo_2 ( id_tempo INT PRIMARY KEY, data DATE NOT NULL CHECK (data >= '2000-01-01') );
key_bug_features: Calculation Date function using interval with year
